ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( $Setup.Kingsbridge_General_Custom_Setting__c.Validation_Rule__c = False, $User.Alias <> 'IntUser', $User.Alias <> 'guest', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Customer_Lead', NOT(ISBLANK(Renewal_Date__c)), Renewal_Date_not_Given__c = True, OR(ISPICKVAL(Status , 'Unqualified'), ISPICKVAL(Status , 'Nurturing'), ISPICKVAL(Status , 'Qualified') ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: LV5: Please confirm whether either a Renewal Date has been provided or not.
